text.message: ill have wood trades in the future
i am in such a bad spot
why man i need this spot or i am dead lol
i need the extra sheep for the sheep port
i just solo you all game
i am sorry i need the sheep for the port
but if you solo me all game i'll just report you
this is a social game man and if you willingly kill my game
you killed your own game with your choices and then lost a race
sorry i wanted the best expansion spot in my game
okay well those choices have consequences man
yes, your choice to place poorly and start a race your couldn't win had a consequence
sorry you are being a baby about the consequences of poor strategic decisions
i dont think i placed poorly, i placed how i had to
i didnt think oj would go 854
i dont think thats a good spot to take
but he did and it uniquely ruined me
neeeded that because blue had an too strong ows
then if oj ruined you, why not solo them lol
sorry man but youre getting solod
and probably will lose your account
catan must be so fun for you, if every time you mess up and lose you throw a fit
none of this could be your fault, for bad placements and challenging people in races you cant win
you need to understand board balance is important, if you just kill a player
what point do they have to play correctly?
but i thought oj killed you?
you think taking 8510 with the 2nd best wheat is a bad placement?
on this board the predictable placements happened
black can we focus on red to?
it was either 8/5/4 or 6/9/2 for oj
and whatever oj does not take I do
the only thing i would have done differently as oj is point the road left
he goes to brick port with 7 cards
you guys arebad for the game
black can be at 9 to lol
oof i would have traded to help you extend oj
